title: Targeted Kerberoasting: SPN Set on User Account
description: Detects targeted kerberoasting, where an attacker with write access to a user object sets a servicePrincipalName so the account becomes kerberoastable, then requests and removes it. Indicators: Set-ADUser/Set-DomainObject writing serviceprincipalname, or the targetedKerberoast tool.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*serviceprincipalname*' or 'Command Line' like '*targetedKerberoast*' or 'Command Line' like '*Set-DomainObject*')) and (('Command Line' like '*Set-ADUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*-ServicePrincipalName*' or 'Command Line' like '*targetedKerberoast*' or 'Command Line' like '*serviceprincipalname*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate SPN registration for new services
